sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1190" key="a)delfea/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀδελφεά</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀδεισι-εή</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀδελφεός</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀδεισι-ειός</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> sub <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀδελφή, ἀδελφός.</foreign> </entryFree>
